sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
After clicking the purple ring at (41, 42):
- Purple ring (p, 21px) moved from (41, 42) to (38, 42)
- White diamond (W, 9px) now at (41, 41) - moved from (48, 39)
- Dark gray at (35, 45) changed from 12px to 10px
So clicking the purple ring moved both the purple ring and the white diamond!
Now:
- Purple ring at (38, 42)
- White diamond at (41, 41)
- Dark gray at (35, 45) with 10px (was 12px)
Let me continue clicking the purple ring to move it further.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Purple ring moved to (38,42), white diamond to (41,41)
# Try clicking purple ring again at (38,42)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 38, 'col': 42}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("After purple ring click:")
for n in seg:
    if n['pixels'] < 30 and n['color'] in ['W', 'G', 'p', 'O', 'M', 'w']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, center={center}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}, Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
